disambiguation_rules.communist party of china: Defined in subsection (2)(A) as the ruling party including party bodies at national and sub-national levels and any agency or instrumentality of the Communist Party of China
disambiguation_rules.government of the people's republic of c: Defined in subsection (2)(C) to include national or sub-national governmental units, legislatures, judicial bodies, supervision commissions, and agencies or instrumentalities
disambiguation_rules.covered issuer: Defined in subsection (2)(B) to mean issuers headquartered in PRC, branches/subsidiaries, or variable interest entities controlled by PRC entities, or tax haven domiciled entities with majority operations in mainland China
disambiguation_rules.prc: Confirmed as People's Republic of China in subsection (F)
disambiguation_rules.senior official: Defined in subsection (G) as officials at deputy provincial/ministerial level (shengbu ji fu zhi) or higher, or chief bureau level (tingju ji zheng zhi) or higher
disambiguation_rules.variable interest entity: Defined in subsection (H) as entity where investor has controlling interest not based on majority voting rights

oddities.note: Document is a bill introduction page with minimal substantive content; full legislative text not provided in this excerpt.
